title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: Tutorial on building a real-world multi-agent AI travel planning system using LangGraph. The project integrates four specialized agents (flight, hotel, itinerary, and response) that coordinate to plan trips using real-time APIs and persistent memory with PostgreSQL.
